name: Franchisee Dispatch Status
query:
SELECT
    si.posting_date AS "Date:Date:120",
    si.name AS "Invoice:Link/Sales Invoice:150",
    si.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer:200",
    c.customer_group AS "Customer Group:Data:150",
    si.lr_no AS "LR No:Data:150",
    si.grand_total AS "Amount:Currency:120",
    si.status AS "Status:Data:120"
FROM
    `tabSales Invoice` si
LEFT JOIN
    `tabCustomer` c ON si.customer = c.name
WHERE
    c.customer_group = "Franchise"
    AND si.docstatus = 1
    AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
ORDER BY
    si.posting_date DESC
